use tokio::task::JoinHandle;

fn spawn_workers(data: Vec<WorkItem>) {
    for item in data {
        tokio::spawn(async move {
            process(item).await;
        });
    }
}

fn spawn_background_cleanup(pool: Pool) {
    tokio::spawn(async move {
        loop {
            pool.cleanup().await;
            tokio::time::sleep(std::time::Duration::from_secs(60)).await;
        }
    });
}

async fn process(_item: WorkItem) { todo!() }
struct WorkItem;
struct Pool;
impl Pool { async fn cleanup(&self) { todo!() } }
